sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91694" key="purikau/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρι-καύτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91694.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burning with fire</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σφαίρης πυρικαύτορα κύκλον</foreign> Timo<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0284.tlg001.perseus-grc1:67:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">67.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
